name: AI Visual
description: Visual detection and region-analysis capability contributions for image and video AI runs.
author: skier233

tutorialTopics.title: AI Visual
tutorialTopics.description: Visual embeddings, detections, and similarity search for videos and images.

slides.imageAlt: Visual search unlocked after running visual analysis
slides.title: Teach Cove what your media looks like
slides.caption: Run AI with visual analysis on your videos and images. AI Visual studies how each item looks, which unlocks search-by-meaning and look-alike results.
slides.bodyMarkdown: Once visual analysis has run, two features light up: **semantic search** (describe what you want to see) and the **Similar** tab (jump from one item to visually related ones). Run it on a small batch first to see it in action.

slides.title: Search by meaning, not just words
slides.caption: On the Videos and Images pages, switch the search-mode dropdown from Text to Visual, then describe what you're looking for — even if those words appear in no title, description, or tag.
slides.bodyMarkdown: Try a phrase like "red car at night" or "two people on a beach." Cove ranks your library by how well each item *looks* like your description. When Visual search is active, a **Visual Match** sort option appears so you can order results by closeness.
slides.imageAlt: The search bar with the Text/Visual mode dropdown set to Visual and semantic results
points: [green] Switch the search mode from Text to Visual
[blue] Type what you want to see, in plain language
Sort by Visual Match to put the closest results first

slides.title: Find look-alikes from any item
slides.caption: Open a video or image and choose the Similar tab to see visually related media. Toggle between similar videos and similar images, each scored by match percentage.
slides.bodyMarkdown: This is the fast way to say "more like this." From any item's **Similar** tab, browse look‑alikes across your library and open them directly — handy for grouping related content or finding duplicates.
slides.imageAlt: A video detail page Similar tab showing visually similar media with match percentages
